queries.name: sponsorables
queries.description: Users and organizations who can be sponsored via GitHub Sponsors.

args.name: after
args.description: Returns the elements in the list that come after the specified cursor.

args.name: before
args.description: Returns the elements in the list that come before the specified cursor.

args.name: dependencyEcosystem
args.description:
Optional filter for which dependencies should be checked for sponsorable owners. Only sponsorable owners of dependencies in this ecosystem will be included. Used when onlyDependencies = true.

Upcoming Change on 2022-07-01 UTC Description: dependencyEcosystem will be removed. Use the ecosystem argument instead. Reason: The type is switching from SecurityAdvisoryEcosystem to DependencyGraphEcosystem.

args.name: ecosystem
args.description: Optional filter for which dependencies should be checked for sponsorable owners. Only sponsorable owners of dependencies in this ecosystem will be included. Used when onlyDependencies = true.

args.name: first
args.description: Returns the first n elements from the list.

args.name: last
args.description: Returns the last n elements from the list.

args.name: onlyDependencies
args.description: Whether only sponsorables who own the viewer's dependencies will be returned. Must be authenticated to use. Can check an organization instead for their dependencies owned by sponsorables by passing orgLoginForDependencies.

args.name: orderBy
args.description: Ordering options for users and organizations returned from the connection.

args.name: orgLoginForDependencies
args.description: Optional organization username for whose dependencies should be checked. Used when onlyDependencies = true. Omit to check your own dependencies. If you are not an administrator of the organization, only dependencies from its public repositories will be considered.

returnFields.name: clientMutationId
returnFields.description: A unique identifier for the client performing the mutation.

returnFields.name: sponsorsTier
returnFields.description: The tier that was being used at the time of cancellation.

mutations.name: createSponsorsListing
mutations.description: Create a GitHub Sponsors profile to allow others to sponsor you or your organization.

returnFields.name: clientMutationId
returnFields.description: A unique identifier for the client performing the mutation.

mutations.name: createSponsorsTier
mutations.description: Create a new payment tier for your GitHub Sponsors profile.

returnFields.name: clientMutationId
returnFields.description: A unique identifier for the client performing the mutation.

mutations.name: createSponsorship
mutations.description: Start a new sponsorship of a maintainer in GitHub Sponsors, or reactivate a past sponsorship.

returnFields.name: clientMutationId
returnFields.description: A unique identifier for the client performing the mutation.

mutations.name: createSponsorships
mutations.description: Make many sponsorships for different sponsorable users or organizations at once. Can only sponsor those who have a public GitHub Sponsors profile.

returnFields.name: clientMutationId
returnFields.description: A unique identifier for the client performing the mutation.

returnFields.name: sponsorables
returnFields.description: The users and organizations who received a sponsorship.

mutations.name: publishSponsorsTier
mutations.description: Publish an existing sponsorship tier that is currently still a draft to a GitHub Sponsors profile.

returnFields.name: clientMutationId
returnFields.description: A unique identifier for the client performing the mutation.

mutations.name: retireSponsorsTier
mutations.description: Retire a published payment tier from your GitHub Sponsors profile so it cannot be used to start new sponsorships.

returnFields.name: clientMutationId
returnFields.description: A unique identifier for the client performing the mutation.

mutations.name: updatePatreonSponsorability
mutations.description: Toggle the setting for your GitHub Sponsors profile that allows other GitHub accounts to sponsor you on GitHub while paying for the sponsorship on Patreon. Only applicable when you have a GitHub Sponsors profile and have connected your GitHub account with Patreon.

returnFields.name: clientMutationId
returnFields.description: A unique identifier for the client performing the mutation.

mutations.name: updateSponsorshipPreferences
mutations.description: Change visibility of your sponsorship and opt in or out of email updates from the maintainer.

returnFields.name: clientMutationId
returnFields.description: A unique identifier for the client performing the mutation.

objects.name: SponsorsGoal
objects.description: A goal associated with a GitHub Sponsors listing, representing a target the sponsored maintainer would like to attain.

fields.name: description
fields.description: A description of the goal from the maintainer.

fields.name: kind
fields.description: What the objective of this goal is.

fields.name: percentComplete
fields.description: The percentage representing how complete this goal is, between 0-100.

fields.name: targetValue
fields.description: What the goal amount is. Represents an amount in USD for monthly sponsorship amount goals. Represents a count of unique sponsors for total sponsors count goals.

fields.name: title
fields.description: A brief summary of the kind and target value of this goal.

fields.name: activeGoal
fields.description: The current goal the maintainer is trying to reach with GitHub Sponsors, if any.

fields.name: activeStripeConnectAccount
fields.description: The Stripe Connect account currently in use for payouts for this Sponsors listing, if any. Will only return a value when queried by the maintainer themselves, or by an admin of the sponsorable organization.

fields.name: billingCountryOrRegion
fields.description: The name of the country or region with the maintainer's bank account or fiscal host. Will only return a value when queried by the maintainer themselves, or by an admin of the sponsorable organization.

fields.name: contactEmailAddress
fields.description: The email address used by GitHub to contact the sponsorable about their GitHub Sponsors profile. Will only return a value when queried by the maintainer themselves, or by an admin of the sponsorable organization.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: Identifies the date and time when the object was created.

fields.name: dashboardResourcePath
fields.description: The HTTP path for the Sponsors dashboard for this Sponsors listing.

fields.name: dashboardUrl
fields.description: The HTTP URL for the Sponsors dashboard for this Sponsors listing.

fields.name: featuredItems
fields.description: The records featured on the GitHub Sponsors profile.

arguments.name: featureableTypes
arguments.description: The types of featured items to return.

fields.name: fiscalHost
fields.description: The fiscal host used for payments, if any. Will only return a value when queried by the maintainer themselves, or by an admin of the sponsorable organization.

fields.name: fullDescription
fields.description: The full description of the listing.

fields.name: fullDescriptionHTML
fields.description: The full description of the listing rendered to HTML.

fields.name: id
fields.description: The Node ID of the SponsorsListing object.

fields.name: isPublic
fields.description: Whether this listing is publicly visible.

fields.name: name
fields.description: The listing's full name.

fields.name: nextPayoutDate
fields.description: A future date on which this listing is eligible to receive a payout.

fields.name: residenceCountryOrRegion
fields.description: The name of the country or region where the maintainer resides. Will only return a value when queried by the maintainer themselves, or by an admin of the sponsorable organization.

fields.name: resourcePath
fields.description: The HTTP path for this Sponsors listing.

fields.name: shortDescription
fields.description: The short description of the listing.

fields.name: slug
fields.description: The short name of the listing.

fields.name: sponsorable
fields.description: The entity this listing represents who can be sponsored on GitHub Sponsors.

fields.name: tiers
fields.description: The tiers for this GitHub Sponsors profile.

arguments.name: after
arguments.description: Returns the elements in the list that come after the specified cursor.

arguments.name: before
arguments.description: Returns the elements in the list that come before the specified cursor.

arguments.name: first
arguments.description: Returns the first n elements from the list.

arguments.name: includeUnpublished
arguments.description: Whether to include tiers that aren't published. Only admins of the Sponsors listing can see draft tiers. Only admins of the Sponsors listing and viewers who are currently sponsoring on a retired tier can see those retired tiers. Defaults to including only published tiers, which are visible to anyone who can see the GitHub Sponsors profile.

arguments.name: last
arguments.description: Returns the last n elements from the list.

arguments.name: orderBy
arguments.description: Ordering options for Sponsors tiers returned from the connection.

fields.name: url
fields.description: The HTTP URL for this Sponsors listing.

objects.name: SponsorsListingFeaturedItem
objects.description: A record that is promoted on a GitHub Sponsors profile.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: Identifies the date and time when the object was created.

fields.name: description
fields.description: Will either be a description from the sponsorable maintainer about why they featured this item, or the item's description itself, such as a user's bio from their GitHub profile page.

fields.name: featureable
fields.description: The record that is featured on the GitHub Sponsors profile.

fields.name: id
fields.description: The Node ID of the SponsorsListingFeaturedItem object.

fields.name: position
fields.description: The position of this featured item on the GitHub Sponsors profile with a lower position indicating higher precedence. Starts at 1.

fields.name: sponsorsListing
fields.description: The GitHub Sponsors profile that features this record.

fields.name: updatedAt
fields.description: Identifies the date and time when the object was last updated.

objects.name: SponsorsTier
objects.description: A GitHub Sponsors tier associated with a GitHub Sponsors listing.

fields.name: adminInfo
fields.description: SponsorsTier information only visible to users that can administer the associated Sponsors listing.

fields.name: closestLesserValueTier
fields.description: Get a different tier for this tier's maintainer that is at the same frequency as this tier but with an equal or lesser cost. Returns the published tier with the monthly price closest to this tier's without going over.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: Identifies the date and time when the object was created.

fields.name: description
fields.description: The description of the tier.

fields.name: descriptionHTML
fields.description: The tier description rendered to HTML.

fields.name: id
fields.description: The Node ID of the SponsorsTier object.

fields.name: isCustomAmount
fields.description: Whether this tier was chosen at checkout time by the sponsor rather than defined ahead of time by the maintainer who manages the Sponsors listing.

fields.name: isOneTime
fields.description: Whether this tier is only for use with one-time sponsorships.

fields.name: monthlyPriceInCents
fields.description: How much this tier costs per month in cents.

fields.name: monthlyPriceInDollars
fields.description: How much this tier costs per month in USD.

fields.name: name
fields.description: The name of the tier.

fields.name: sponsorsListing
fields.description: The sponsors listing that this tier belongs to.

fields.name: updatedAt
fields.description: Identifies the date and time when the object was last updated.

objects.name: SponsorsTierAdminInfo
objects.description: SponsorsTier information only visible to users that can administer the associated Sponsors listing.

fields.name: isDraft
fields.description: Indicates whether this tier is still a work in progress by the sponsorable and not yet published to the associated GitHub Sponsors profile. Draft tiers cannot be used for new sponsorships and will not be in use on existing sponsorships. Draft tiers cannot be seen by anyone but the admins of the GitHub Sponsors profile.

fields.name: isPublished
fields.description: Indicates whether this tier is published to the associated GitHub Sponsors profile. Published tiers are visible to anyone who can see the GitHub Sponsors profile, and are available for use in sponsorships if the GitHub Sponsors profile is publicly visible.

fields.name: isRetired
fields.description: Indicates whether this tier has been retired from the associated GitHub Sponsors profile. Retired tiers are no longer shown on the GitHub Sponsors profile and cannot be chosen for new sponsorships. Existing sponsorships may still use retired tiers if the sponsor selected the tier before it was retired.

fields.name: sponsorships
fields.description: The sponsorships using this tier.

arguments.name: after
arguments.description: Returns the elements in the list that come after the specified cursor.

arguments.name: before
arguments.description: Returns the elements in the list that come before the specified cursor.

arguments.name: first
arguments.description: Returns the first n elements from the list.

arguments.name: includePrivate
arguments.description: Whether or not to return private sponsorships using this tier. Defaults to only returning public sponsorships on this tier.

arguments.name: last
arguments.description: Returns the last n elements from the list.

arguments.name: orderBy
arguments.description: Ordering options for sponsorships returned from this connection. If left blank, the sponsorships will be ordered based on relevancy to the viewer.

objects.name: Sponsorship
objects.description: A sponsorship relationship between a sponsor and a maintainer.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: Identifies the date and time when the object was created.

fields.name: id
fields.description: The Node ID of the Sponsorship object.

fields.name: isActive
fields.description: Whether the sponsorship is active. False implies the sponsor is a past sponsor of the maintainer, while true implies they are a current sponsor.

fields.name: isOneTimePayment
fields.description: Whether this sponsorship represents a one-time payment versus a recurring sponsorship.

fields.name: isSponsorOptedIntoEmail
fields.description: Whether the sponsor has chosen to receive sponsorship update emails sent from the sponsorable. Only returns a non-null value when the viewer has permission to know this.

fields.name: maintainer
fields.description: The entity that is being sponsored.
fields.deprecationReason: Sponsorship.maintainer will be removed. Use Sponsorship.sponsorable instead. Removal on 2020-04-01 UTC.

fields.name: paymentSource
fields.description: The platform that was most recently used to pay for the sponsorship.

fields.name: privacyLevel
fields.description: The privacy level for this sponsorship.

fields.name: sponsor
fields.description: The user that is sponsoring. Returns null if the sponsorship is private or if sponsor is not a user.
fields.deprecationReason: Sponsorship.sponsor will be removed. Use Sponsorship.sponsorEntity instead. Removal on 2020-10-01 UTC.

fields.name: sponsorEntity
fields.description: The user or organization that is sponsoring, if you have permission to view them.

fields.name: sponsorable
fields.description: The entity that is being sponsored.

fields.name: tier
fields.description: The associated sponsorship tier.

fields.name: tierSelectedAt
fields.description: Identifies the date and time when the current tier was chosen for this sponsorship.

objects.name: SponsorshipConnection
objects.description: A list of sponsorships either from the subject or received by the subject.

fields.name: edges
fields.description: A list of edges.

fields.name: nodes

fields.name: pageInfo

fields.name: totalCount
fields.description: Identifies the total count of items in the connection.

fields.name: totalRecurringMonthlyPriceInCents
fields.description: The total amount in cents of all recurring sponsorships in the connection whose amount you can view. Does not include one-time sponsorships.

fields.name: totalRecurringMonthlyPriceInDollars
fields.description: The total amount in USD of all recurring sponsorships in the connection whose amount you can view. Does not include one-time sponsorships.

fields.name: cursor
fields.description: A cursor for use in pagination.

fields.name: node
fields.description: The item at the end of the edge.

fields.name: author

fields.name: body
fields.description: The contents of the newsletter, the message the sponsorable wanted to give.

fields.name: createdAt

fields.name: id

fields.name: isPublished
fields.description: Indicates if the newsletter has been made available to sponsors.

fields.name: sponsorable
fields.description: The user or organization this newsletter is from.

fields.name: subject
fields.description: The subject of the newsletter, what it's about.

fields.name: updatedAt
fields.description: Identifies the date and time when the object was last updated.

objects.name: StripeConnectAccount
objects.description: A Stripe Connect account for receiving sponsorship funds from GitHub Sponsors.

fields.name: accountId
fields.description: The account number used to identify this Stripe Connect account.

fields.name: billingCountryOrRegion
fields.description: The name of the country or region of an external account, such as a bank account, tied to the Stripe Connect account. Will only return a value when queried by the maintainer of the associated GitHub Sponsors profile themselves, or by an admin of the sponsorable organization.

fields.name: countryOrRegion
fields.description: The name of the country or region of the Stripe Connect account. Will only return a value when queried by the maintainer of the associated GitHub Sponsors profile themselves, or by an admin of the sponsorable organization.

fields.name: isActive
fields.description: Whether this Stripe Connect account is currently in use for the associated GitHub Sponsors profile.

fields.name: sponsorsListing
fields.description: The GitHub Sponsors profile associated with this Stripe Connect account.

fields.name: stripeDashboardUrl
fields.description: The URL to access this Stripe Connect account on Stripe's website.

interfaces.name: Sponsorable
interfaces.description: Entities that can sponsor or be sponsored through GitHub Sponsors.

fields.name: estimatedNextSponsorsPayoutInCents
fields.description: The estimated next GitHub Sponsors payout for this user/organization in cents (USD).

fields.name: hasSponsorsListing
fields.description: True if this user/organization has a GitHub Sponsors listing.

fields.name: isSponsoredBy
fields.description: Whether the given account is sponsoring this user/organization.

arguments.description: The target account's login.

fields.name: isSponsoringViewer
fields.description: True if the viewer is sponsored by this user/organization.

fields.name: lifetimeReceivedSponsorshipValues
fields.description: Calculate how much each sponsor has ever paid total to this maintainer via GitHub Sponsors. Does not include sponsorships paid via Patreon.

arguments.name: tierId
arguments.description: If given, will filter for sponsors at the given tier. Will only return sponsors whose tier the viewer is permitted to see.

fields.name: sponsorsActivities
fields.description: Events involving this sponsorable, such as new sponsorships.

arguments.name: actions
arguments.description: Filter activities to only the specified actions.

arguments.name: after
arguments.description: Returns the elements in the list that come after the specified cursor.

arguments.name: before
arguments.description: Returns the elements in the list that come before the specified cursor.

arguments.name: first
arguments.description: Returns the first n elements from the list.

arguments.name: includeAsSponsor
arguments.description: Whether to include those events where this sponsorable acted as the sponsor. Defaults to only including events where this sponsorable was the recipient of a sponsorship.

arguments.name: includePrivate
arguments.description: Whether or not to include private activities in the result set. Defaults to including public and private activities.

arguments.name: last
arguments.description: Returns the last n elements from the list.

arguments.name: orderBy
arguments.description: Ordering options for activity returned from the connection.

arguments.name: period
arguments.description: Filter activities returned to only those that occurred in the most recent specified time period. Set to ALL to avoid filtering by when the activity occurred. Will be ignored if since or until is given.

arguments.name: since
arguments.description: Filter activities to those that occurred on or after this time.

arguments.name: until
arguments.description: Filter activities to those that occurred before this time.

fields.name: sponsorsListing
fields.description: The GitHub Sponsors listing for this user or organization.

fields.name: sponsorshipForViewerAsSponsor
fields.description: The sponsorship from the viewer to this user/organization; that is, the sponsorship where you're the sponsor.

arguments.name: activeOnly
arguments.description: Whether to return the sponsorship only if it's still active. Pass false to get the viewer's sponsorship back even if it has been cancelled.

fields.name: sponsorshipForViewerAsSponsorable
fields.description: The sponsorship from this user/organization to the viewer; that is, the sponsorship you're receiving.

arguments.name: activeOnly
arguments.description: Whether to return the sponsorship only if it's still active. Pass false to get the sponsorship back even if it has been cancelled.

fields.name: sponsorshipNewsletters
fields.description: List of sponsorship updates sent from this sponsorable to sponsors.

fields.description: The sponsorships where this user or organization is the maintainer receiving the funds.

arguments.name: activeOnly
arguments.description: Whether to include only sponsorships that are active right now, versus all sponsorships this maintainer has ever received.

arguments.description: Returns the elements in the list that come after the specified cursor.

fields.name: sponsorshipsAsSponsor
fields.description: The sponsorships where this user or organization is the funder.

arguments.name: activeOnly
arguments.description: Whether to include only sponsorships that are active right now, versus all sponsorships this sponsor has ever made.

arguments.name: after
arguments.description: Returns the elements in the list that come after the specified cursor.

arguments.name: before
arguments.description: Returns the elements in the list that come before the specified cursor.

arguments.name: first
arguments.description: Returns the first n elements from the list.

arguments.name: last
arguments.description: Returns the last n elements from the list.

arguments.name: maintainerLogins
arguments.description: Filter sponsorships returned to those for the specified maintainers. That is, the recipient of the sponsorship is a user or organization with one of the given logins.

arguments.name: orderBy
arguments.description: Ordering options for sponsorships returned from this connection. If left blank, the sponsorships will be ordered based on relevancy to the viewer.

fields.name: totalSponsorshipAmountAsSponsorInCents
fields.description: The amount in United States cents (e.g., 500 = $5.00 USD) that this entity has spent on GitHub to fund sponsorships. Only returns a value when viewed by the user themselves or by a user who can manage sponsorships for the requested organization.

arguments.name: since
arguments.description: Filter payments to those that occurred on or after this time.

arguments.name: sponsorableLogins
arguments.description: Filter payments to those made to the users or organizations with the specified usernames.

arguments.name: until
arguments.description: Filter payments to those that occurred before this time.

fields.name: viewerCanSponsor
fields.description: Whether or not the viewer is able to sponsor this user/organization.

fields.name: viewerIsSponsoring
fields.description: True if the viewer is sponsoring this user/organization.

enums.name: SponsorAndLifetimeValueOrderField
enums.description: Properties by which sponsor and lifetime value connections can be ordered.

values.name: LIFETIME_VALUE
values.description: Order results by how much money the sponsor has paid in total.

values.name: SPONSOR_RELEVANCE
values.description: Order results by the sponsor's relevance to the viewer.

enums.name: SponsorOrderField
enums.description: Properties by which sponsor connections can be ordered.

values.name: RELEVANCE
values.description: Order sponsors by their relevance to the viewer.

enums.name: SponsorableOrderField
enums.description: Properties by which sponsorable connections can be ordered.

enums.name: SponsorsActivityAction
enums.description: The possible actions that GitHub Sponsors activities can represent.

values.name: PENDING_CHANGE
values.description: The activity was scheduling a downgrade or cancellation.

values.name: REFUND
values.description: The activity was funds being refunded to the sponsor or GitHub.

values.name: SPONSOR_MATCH_DISABLED
values.description: The activity was disabling matching for a previously matched sponsorship.

values.name: TIER_CHANGE
values.description: The activity was changing the sponsorship tier, either directly by the sponsor or by a scheduled/pending change.

enums.name: SponsorsActivityOrderField
enums.description: Properties by which GitHub Sponsors activity connections can be ordered.

enums.name: SponsorsActivityPeriod
enums.description: The possible time periods for which Sponsors activities can be requested.

values.name: ALL
values.description: Don't restrict the activity to any date range, include all activity.

enums.name: SponsorsCountryOrRegionCode
enums.description: Represents countries or regions for billing and residence for a GitHub Sponsors profile.

enums.name: SponsorsGoalKind
enums.description: The different kinds of goals a GitHub Sponsors member can have.

values.name: MONTHLY_SPONSORSHIP_AMOUNT
values.description: The goal is about getting a certain amount in USD from sponsorships each month.

values.name: TOTAL_SPONSORS_COUNT
values.description: The goal is about reaching a certain number of sponsors.

enums.name: SponsorsListingFeaturedItemFeatureableType
enums.description: The different kinds of records that can be featured on a GitHub Sponsors profile page.

values.name: REPOSITORY
values.description: A repository owned by the user or organization with the GitHub Sponsors profile.

values.name: USER
values.description: A user who belongs to the organization with the GitHub Sponsors profile.

enums.name: SponsorsTierOrderField
enums.description: Properties by which Sponsors tiers connections can be ordered.

values.name: MONTHLY_PRICE_IN_CENTS
values.description: Order tiers by their monthly price in cents.

enums.name: SponsorshipNewsletterOrderField
enums.description: Properties by which sponsorship update connections can be ordered.

values.name: CREATED_AT
values.description: Order sponsorship newsletters by when they were created.

enums.name: SponsorshipOrderField
enums.description: Properties by which sponsorship connections can be ordered.

enums.name: SponsorshipPaymentSource
enums.description: How payment was made for funding a GitHub Sponsors sponsorship.

unions.name: Sponsor
unions.description: Entities that can sponsor others via GitHub Sponsors.

unions.name: SponsorableItem
unions.description: Entities that can be sponsored via GitHub Sponsors.

unions.name: SponsorsListingFeatureableItem

inputObjects.name: BulkSponsorship
inputObjects.description: Information about a sponsorship to make for a user or organization with a GitHub Sponsors profile, as part of sponsoring many users or organizations at once.

inputFields.name: amount
inputFields.description: The amount to pay to the sponsorable in US dollars. Valid values: 1-12000.

inputFields.name: sponsorableId
inputFields.description: The ID of the user or organization who is receiving the sponsorship. Required if sponsorableLogin is not given.

inputFields.name: sponsorableLogin
inputFields.description: The username of the user or organization who is receiving the sponsorship. Required if sponsorableId is not given.

inputFields.name: clientMutationId
inputFields.description: A unique identifier for the client performing the mutation.

inputFields.name: sponsorId
inputFields.description: The ID of the user or organization who is acting as the sponsor, paying for the sponsorship. Required if sponsorLogin is not given.

inputFields.name: sponsorLogin
inputFields.description: The username of the user or organization who is acting as the sponsor, paying for the sponsorship. Required if sponsorId is not given.

inputFields.name: sponsorableId
inputFields.description: The ID of the user or organization who is receiving the sponsorship. Required if sponsorableLogin is not given.

inputFields.name: sponsorableLogin
inputFields.description: The username of the user or organization who is receiving the sponsorship. Required if sponsorableId is not given.

inputFields.name: billingCountryOrRegionCode
inputFields.description: The country or region where the sponsorable's bank account is located. Required if fiscalHostLogin is not specified, ignored when fiscalHostLogin is specified.

inputFields.name: clientMutationId
inputFields.description: A unique identifier for the client performing the mutation.

inputFields.name: contactEmail
inputFields.description: The email address we should use to contact you about the GitHub Sponsors profile being created. This will not be shared publicly. Must be a verified email address already on your GitHub account. Only relevant when the sponsorable is yourself. Defaults to your primary email address on file if omitted.

inputFields.name: fiscalHostLogin
inputFields.description: The username of the supported fiscal host's GitHub organization, if you want to receive sponsorship payouts through a fiscal host rather than directly to a bank account. For example,Open-Source-Collectivefor Open Source Collective or 'numfocus' for numFOCUS. Case insensitive. See https://docs.github.com/sponsors/receiving-sponsorships-through-github-sponsors/using-a-fiscal-host-to-receive-github-sponsors-payouts for more information.

inputFields.name: fiscallyHostedProjectProfileUrl
inputFields.description: The URL for your profile page on the fiscal host's website, e.g., https://opencollective.com/babel or https://numfocus.org/project/bokeh. Required if fiscalHostLogin is specified.

inputFields.name: fullDescription
inputFields.description: Provide an introduction to serve as the main focus that appears on your GitHub Sponsors profile. It's a great opportunity to help potential sponsors learn more about you, your work, and why their sponsorship is important to you. GitHub-flavored Markdown is supported.

inputFields.name: residenceCountryOrRegionCode
inputFields.description: The country or region where the sponsorable resides. This is for tax purposes. Required if the sponsorable is yourself, ignored when sponsorableLogin specifies an organization.

inputFields.name: sponsorableLogin
inputFields.description: The username of the organization to create a GitHub Sponsors profile for, if desired. Defaults to creating a GitHub Sponsors profile for the authenticated user if omitted.

inputFields.name: amount
inputFields.description: The value of the new tier in US dollars. Valid values: 1-12000.

inputFields.name: clientMutationId
inputFields.description: A unique identifier for the client performing the mutation.

inputFields.name: description
inputFields.description: A description of what this tier is, what perks sponsors might receive, what a sponsorship at this tier means for you, etc.

inputFields.name: isRecurring
inputFields.description: Whether sponsorships using this tier should happen monthly/yearly or just once.

inputFields.name: publish
inputFields.description: Whether to make the tier available immediately for sponsors to choose. Defaults to creating a draft tier that will not be publicly visible.

inputFields.name: repositoryId
inputFields.description: Optional ID of the private repository that sponsors at this tier should gain read-only access to. Must be owned by an organization.

inputFields.name: repositoryName
inputFields.description: Optional name of the private repository that sponsors at this tier should gain read-only access to. Must be owned by an organization. Necessary if repositoryOwnerLogin is given. Will be ignored if repositoryId is given.

inputFields.name: repositoryOwnerLogin
inputFields.description: Optional login of the organization owner of the private repository that sponsors at this tier should gain read-only access to. Necessary if repositoryName is given. Will be ignored if repositoryId is given.

inputFields.name: sponsorableId
inputFields.description: The ID of the user or organization who owns the GitHub Sponsors profile. Defaults to the current user if omitted and sponsorableLogin is not given.

inputFields.name: sponsorableLogin
inputFields.description: The username of the user or organization who owns the GitHub Sponsors profile. Defaults to the current user if omitted and sponsorableId is not given.

inputFields.name: welcomeMessage
inputFields.description: Optional message new sponsors at this tier will receive.

inputFields.name: amount
inputFields.description: The amount to pay to the sponsorable in US dollars. Required if a tierId is not specified. Valid values: 1-12000.

inputFields.name: clientMutationId
inputFields.description: A unique identifier for the client performing the mutation.

inputFields.name: isRecurring
inputFields.description: Whether the sponsorship should happen monthly/yearly or just this one time. Required if a tierId is not specified.

inputFields.name: privacyLevel
inputFields.description: Specify whether others should be able to see that the sponsor is sponsoring the sponsorable. Public visibility still does not reveal which tier is used.

inputFields.name: receiveEmails
inputFields.description: Whether the sponsor should receive email updates from the sponsorable.

inputFields.name: sponsorId
inputFields.description: The ID of the user or organization who is acting as the sponsor, paying for the sponsorship. Required if sponsorLogin is not given.

inputFields.name: sponsorLogin
inputFields.description: The username of the user or organization who is acting as the sponsor, paying for the sponsorship. Required if sponsorId is not given.

inputFields.name: sponsorableId
inputFields.description: The ID of the user or organization who is receiving the sponsorship. Required if sponsorableLogin is not given.

inputFields.name: sponsorableLogin
inputFields.description: The username of the user or organization who is receiving the sponsorship. Required if sponsorableId is not given.

inputFields.name: tierId
inputFields.description: The ID of one of sponsorable's existing tiers to sponsor at. Required if amount is not specified.

inputFields.name: clientMutationId
inputFields.description: A unique identifier for the client performing the mutation.

inputFields.name: privacyLevel
inputFields.description: Specify whether others should be able to see that the sponsor is sponsoring the sponsorables. Public visibility still does not reveal the dollar value of the sponsorship.

inputFields.name: receiveEmails
inputFields.description: Whether the sponsor should receive email updates from the sponsorables.

inputFields.name: recurring
inputFields.description: Whether the sponsorships created should continue each billing cycle for the sponsor (monthly or annually), versus lasting only a single month. Defaults to one-time sponsorships.

inputFields.name: sponsorLogin
inputFields.description: The username of the user or organization who is acting as the sponsor, paying for the sponsorships.

inputFields.name: sponsorships
inputFields.description: The list of maintainers to sponsor and for how much apiece.

inputFields.name: clientMutationId
inputFields.description: A unique identifier for the client performing the mutation.

inputFields.name: tierId
inputFields.description: The ID of the draft tier to publish.

inputFields.name: clientMutationId
inputFields.description: A unique identifier for the client performing the mutation.

inputFields.name: tierId
inputFields.description: The ID of the published tier to retire.
